# Implementation proof ad

## When to use

Use for adoption-risk buyers.

## Why it works

Shows setup burden is manageable.

## Mechanism

Risk often blocks B2B software deals.

## Required inputs

Implementation timeline, checklist, walkthrough.

## When not to use

If implementation is not actually easy.

## Campaign artifact checklist

```text
Buyer state:
Audience:
Pain phrase:
Offer:
Proof asset:
Landing page:
Ad variants:
Measurement event:
Kill rule:
Next test if failed:
```

## Metrics

Setup guide views, enterprise leads.

## Agent instruction

Generate at least five ad variants, one landing-page proof path, one measurement plan, and one learning memo template for this tactic.
